comment_text: As someone who read the book in middle school, I wish they stuck more to the original story. Some key things I remember is that all Jackie wanted to do was go home in the original. I remember the parents actually respected Jackie and her decision and weren’t so possessive over her. In the show the whole family just weirds me out. The only brother I liked was Danny. Cole looks 28 while Jackie looks 15 (yea it’s supposed to be her character’s age but her main love interest just looks so old compared to her!). In the original Jackie chose to go home with her uncle, dumped Alex, and shared one last goodbye kiss with Cole. It was even kinda cute how Cole chased down the car because originally Jackie didn’t tell him bye. Overall i think this show would have done well with just 2 seasons and following more of the storyline. It’s just giving TSITP 2.0!
